response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack engineer with ~14 years of experience and broad polyglot background, but the role is a Director-level IC Principal Engineer focused on AI strategy. The resume shows only light, recent exposure to AI (MCP tooling at re:cinq since April 2025) and no demonstrated AI products, platforms, recognized AI expertise, advanced AI degree, or experience advising strategic customers at executive level. Cloud depth is also limited (some AWS CDK), and there is no evidence of principal-level technical leadership shaping multi-org strategy.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infra
Founder of GISCollective shows entrepreneurial initiative and long-term ownership
Active community contributor with workshops, talks, and open-source tooling
concerns: Minimal demonstrated AI/ML expertise or shipped AI products/platforms
Lacks Principal/Director-level IC scope and strategic advisory experience
Limited deep cloud platform expertise expected for cloud/AI strategy role

key_factors.factor: Insufficient AI expertise and shipped AI products
Seniority gap vs Director-level IC scope
